title: rubroshorea kunstleri
side_effects: Rubroshorea kunstleri can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory distress. In severe cases, using Rubroshorea kunstleri inappropriately can even lead to kidney or liver damage.
